task_completion.description: Open a daily chart for the SPY instrument
task_completion.visual_evidence: A charting application window is open displaying 'SPY' as the active ticker and the timeframe is set to Daily (e.g., '1D' or 'Daily').

task_completion.description: Locate the market peak on July 27, 2023
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart is panned/zoomed to show July 2023, with the cursor or a tool starting at the local high candle on July 27 (price around 459.44).

task_completion.description: Locate the market bottom on October 27, 2023
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart displays October 2023, with the cursor or a tool ending at the local low candle on October 27 (price around 409.21).

task_completion.description: Measure the correction from the July peak to the October bottom
task_completion.visual_evidence: A drawing tool (such as a trendline, price drop tool, or ruler) connects the July 27, 2023 high to the October 27, 2023 low.
The exact text 'Summer Correction' is visible on the chart, attached to or positioned immediately next to the drawn measurement line.
The agent clicks a 'Save Workspace' button, uses a save shortcut, or a 'Workspace saved' confirmation dialog/notification is visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a genuine charting GUI application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a real financial charting application (e.g., NinjaTrader, ThinkOrSwim, TradingView) being used, rather than a terminal, text editor, or image manipulation software.

integrity.description: The measurement and label were created using the charting software's native tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The line and text label appear integrated into the chart's drawing layer, not pasted as plain text over an image or written in a separate notepad window.

integrity.description: The chart displays actual historical market data for SPY
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart shows realistic candlestick or bar data matching the expected price ranges (highs near 459, lows near 409) rather than a blank chart or randomly generated lines.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The instrument must be SPY. The measurement must start precisely at the local high on 2023-07-27 (price ~459.44) and end precisely at the local low on 2023-10-27 (price ~409.21). The text label applied to this measurement must be exactly 'Summer Correction'.
